deals.Description: Develops AI-powered solutions to help power grids manage the increasing demand from data centers, focusing on AI to manage power grid challenges.
deals.Investors: Unknown (Nvidia mentioned backing AI startups in related news)

deals.Description: A Montréal-based manufacturing startup opening autonomous microfactories to make cold-chain products on demand, replacing less environmentally sustainable gel packs.
deals.Round: Seed Extension (also secured 2.5M CAD in equipment financing)
deals.Investors: Desjardins Capital, Waterpoint Lane, RGS Ice, CWV Sustainable Royalties

deals.Description: Ottawa-based AI solutions provider focusing on AI R&D for predictive maintenance, supply chain optimization, and sovereign knowledge management in aerospace and defence sectors.
Edmonton-based aerospace company focused on analytics and data, receiving federal defence funding.
An Artificial Intelligence and B2B Software company.
A company in Music, Analytics, Artificial Intelligence, Audio, and B2B Software.
A company specializing in Cloud Computing, Artificial Intelligence, B2B Software, and Data.
A B2B Software company focused on Education and Human Resources.
A B2B Software company leveraging Artificial Intelligence and Cloud Computing.
A Toronto-based payments platform that rewards Canadians for making rent, bill, and tax payments with a credit card. The company is expanding its services to include small-to-medium-sized businesses.
deals.Investors: Khosla Ventures, Crossbeam, Venrex, Air Canada
deals.Founders: Liza Akhvledziani Carew, Ben Gigone, Abtine Monavvari

deals.Description: A Vancouver-based agtech company developing an AI-powered soil intelligence platform. It combines spectroscopy, genomics, and machine learning to provide comprehensive environmental data for agriculture.
deals.Investors: At One Ventures, Farm Credit Canada, S2G Investments, Sitka Foundation, iSelect

deals.Description: A Canadian-led company with headquarters in New York, developing an artificial intelligence platform to support critical infrastructure in achieving energy autonomy. It offers physics-informed AI software to utility providers for modernizing power grid infrastructure and managing data centre demand.
deals.Investors: Energy Impact Partners, NVentures, Edison International, GE Vernova, Powerhouse Ventures, Active Impact Investments, Blackhorn Ventures, Amplify Capital, and an undisclosed North American investor-owned utility.

deals.Description: Spade is a data and AI platform transforming how financial institutions use transaction data, turning messy transaction strings into structured, verified records to power AI initiatives. They provide real-time merchant intelligence for the card ecosystem.
deals.Investors: Oak HC/FT, Andreessen Horowitz, Flourish, Gradient, NAventures (National Bank of Canada's corporate venture arm), Y Combinator
deals.Founders: Oban MacTavish, Tess Bloch, Cooper Hart

deals.Description: Halifax-based SaaS startup providing an operational engine for driving business impact with people data, centralizing feedback, and offering AI insights for organizational learning.
Toronto-based voice platform that uses AI for phone commerce.
deals.Investors: RTP Global, Jason Lemkin's SaaStr Fund, Mu Ventures, founders of Gorgias & others

deals.Description: Toronto-based AI-powered fleet management platform, building an 'AI operating system' for the trucking industry, starting with intelligent fuel management.

A virtual clinic for midlife women, integrating hormonal health, metabolic wellness, and weight management. It uses advanced technology and AI capabilities to provide personalized, evidence-based roadmaps for menopause symptom management, weight loss, and health longevity.
deals.Investors: Brightspark, Diagram, AQC Capital, Anges Quebec, The51, strategic group of angel investors

deals.Description: An award-winning cloud distributor and marketplace that provides value-added services to Managed Service Providers (MSPs). It enables MSPs to offload technical operations, deepen Microsoft cloud expertise, and scale efficiently.
deals.Investors: Investissement Québec, Fonds pour la croissance des entreprises du Québec (FCEQ)
